economic_notes: Natuaqanek Commercial Fishery Cooperative Ltd. is a government business enterprise accounted for on modified equity basis. Crown land forestry operations and fisheries operations are significant revenue sources.
notes: Natuaqanek Commercial Fishery Cooperative Ltd. is consolidated on modified equity basis as a government business enterprise. Certain tangible capital assets (housing, roads, infrastructure) recorded at nominal $1 where historical data unavailable. Long-term debt decreased significantly from $18.8M to $13.1M due to $6.37M repayment. Large surplus of $10.9M vs budget deficit of $1.19M primarily due to higher-than-budgeted revenues across most categories. Intangible assets of $13,166,769 represent fishing licences recorded at cost and not amortized. Accumulated surplus on statement of operations shows $48,032,793 vs balance sheet $48,032,797 - rounding difference of $4.
